feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Text field from Sales order to finance posting
entry.content:
which text fields can be used for information to be transfered from a sales order to finance?

at the moment just the field assignment in FI can be seen, that corresponds to the customer reference in the sales order.

We need the text field to be available in the FI Apps like Manage Customer Line Items, Post Incoming Payments (Open AP/AR Items), etc.

entry.title: Few currency codes unavailable
entry.content:
The below currency codes which are present in the ISO list, are not available for input in the system.

ISO CodeLong TextShort text
CYPCyprus PoundCyprus Pound
EEKEstonian KroneKrona
LTLLithuanian LitaLita
LVLLatvian LatLat
MTLMaltese LiraLira
SKKSlovakian KronaKrona

There are few currencies which have a different currency code in our system from ISO list:

SAP CurrencyISO CodeLong Text
AFNAFAAfghani (Old)
RSDCSDSerbian Dinar
MRUMROMauritanian Ouguiya
RONROLRomanian Leu
SLESLLSierra Leone Leone
STNSTDSao Tome / Principe Dobra
TMTTMMTurkmenistani Manat
TRYTRLTurkish Lira (Old)
VEFVEBVenezuelan Bolivar

 

 

#SAPS4HANAPublicCloud #2408

entry.title: Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Until the 2302 version of S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, we had the scope item 4AJ available called "Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central". However, this has been deprecated with the release 2308 without a successor scope item. Can someone please explain how to proceed for the integration of financial master data for implementations of newer releases?

Best regards,
Kaiwen

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: SAP S4 PUBLIC CLOUD - WHAT IS IT ABOUT
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Explained in Detail

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud is a robust, cloud-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) solution designed to enhance and streamline business processes across various industries. Here is an in-depth explanation:

Core Features:

  1. Pre-Configured System: This ERP solution comes pre-configured with essential business processes for different functions, such as finance, supply chain, and manufacturing, making it ready to use right out of the box. This minimizes the need for extensive customizations and accelerates the implementation process.

  2. Scalability and Flexibility: One of the key advantages of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud is its scalability. Organizations can easily scale their operations by adding new users, expanding to new markets, or incorporating additional products without adding complexity to the system.

  3. Continuous Innovation: The platform is continually updated with the latest advancements and industry best practices. It incorporates cutting-edge technologies like artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), robotic process automation (RPA), and advanced analytics to help businesses stay competitive and innovative.

  4. Cloud Management: All technical operations, including system maintenance, backups, disaster recovery, and data protection, are managed by the cloud service provider. This ensures high availability and reduces the burden on the organization’s IT department.

  5. Seamless Integration: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud offers robust integration capabilities. It can easily connect with other systems and applications via ready-to-go APIs, facilitating smooth data exchange and interoperability.

  6. User-Friendly Interface: The solution provides a modern, intuitive user interface that enhances user experience. It features role-based access, ensuring that users have the tools and information they need to perform their tasks effectively.

  7. Sustainability and AI: The platform is designed with sustainability in mind, providing tools to monitor and reduce the environmental impact of business operations. Built-in AI capabilities also allow for deep analysis of business data to support decision-making.

Benefits:

  • Operational Efficiency: By streamlining business processes, the platform significantly enhances operational efficiency, reducing manual work and the likelihood of errors.

  • Agility: The flexibility of the cloud allows organizations to quickly adapt to changing business needs, market conditions, and technological advancements.

  • Cost Savings: With no need for extensive IT infrastructure or on-premise hardware, organizations can save on upfront costs and reduce overall IT expenditure.

  • Continuous Improvement: Regular updates ensure that the system is always equipped with the latest features and best practices, allowing organizations to continuously improve their operations.

Ideal Use Cases:

  • Small to Mid-Size Enterprises: This solution is particularly beneficial for small to mid-size enterprises that want to adopt industry best practices without the need for extensive customization.

  • Large Enterprises: Larger organizations can use SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud in combination with other SAP solutions in a two-tier ERP structure, allowing them to manage different subsidiaries or business units efficiently.

Implementation Process:

  • Guided Implementation: The platform offers a guided implementation process that includes a fast technical setup and role-based, intuitive interfaces. This simplifies the transition and helps organizations go live quickly.

  • Regular Updates: Enhancements and upgrades are automatically applied on a regular schedule, ensuring that the system remains up-to-date without disrupting business operations.

Continuous Support:

  • Managed Services: SAP manages all aspects of the system’s technical operations, including maintenance, security, and compliance, ensuring that the organization can focus on its core business activities.

Innovation and Competitiveness:

  • Technological Advancements: By leveraging advanced technologies such as AI, ML, and RPA, organizations can automate routine tasks, gain deeper insights into their operations, and make data-driven decisions.

  • Market Responsiveness: The system's flexibility and scalability enable organizations to respond quickly to market changes, customer demands, and emerging trends, maintaining a competitive edge.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud provides a comprehensive, cloud-based ERP solution that helps organizations streamline their processes, reduce costs, and stay agile and competitive in the ever-evolving business landscape. It’s designed to support digital transformation initiatives, offering the tools and capabilities needed to drive innovation and achieve business goals.

entry.title: Custom CDS view developed in ADT:Status not released when transported to S4/HANA public cloud tenant
entry.content:
Hello, 

New on developing custom CDS data definitions in ADT. 

I managed to create a data definition and transport. I released to S4/HANA Public Cloud tenant. 

The CDS view in S4/HANA is not released. I have tried various annotations to see if that would work to hange the status to released. 

Both the source views used in my custom definition are released. I just cannot get my custom view to go to released. 

Is this a public cloud limitation where custom views developed in ADT cannot be used ?

entry.title: Session disconnect time for apps on SAP public cloud apps
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We would like to know about the session time for apps.

For example, when we try to fill invoices and leave it unsaved for a while, it often happens that the session ends automatically and the information we were filling is no longer maintained. 

Is there a parameter that is related to this session?

Thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Create Overhead Allocation Cycles - Cost Centers - Actual
entry.content:
Hello Expert, 

Earlier, when I used to create an actual assessment cycle in the public cloud, I used to get a different screen. Now, when I go to that tile, I get an error.
Tile name - Create Overhead Allocation Cycles - Cost Centers - Actual 

Error -  Actual Assessments is Replaced By Universal Allocation 
I have tried looking for the solution but unable to find one. Kindly suggest related solution and please provide related document and links. 

Kind Regards
Shubham T.

entry.title: Purchase Order IV qty is more than GR qty since we set IV based on GR
entry.content:
In production system, we found an purchase order met a problem that rarely happened: PO qty is 30 KG, GR qty is 30 KG, IV qty is 40 KG.(1st IV-30KG, 2nd IV-10KG). 

This purchase order item wasn't be changed. 

and we found Purchasing info record is created before purchase order and click the Purchasing control option"Goods-Receipt-Based Invoice Verification "already.

Pls help to found the reason why it be happened and how to prevent such problem in future.

entry.title: validation rule to prevent the user from selecting a date greater than current date or System date
entry.content:
Hello experts,

While creating validation in Manage Substitution and Validation Rules in S4Hana public cloud (2408) rule to prevent the user from selecting a date greater than current date or System date when I give Posting date in Field/Function value will show the calendar to select the date and will not take condition <= SYST-DATUM

Below are the inputs I am giving while creating validation role

 

  • Field/Function: Posting Date
  • Operator: <=
  • Value: SYST-DATUM

 

Its giving below error

The value SY-DATUM of field PostingDate has a wrong format and cannot be processed.

Kindly suggest me how to give the validation role.

entry.title: Asset Class (4001 Inv. Measure Tang) does not allowing line items to Settle AUC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are managing AUC with Investment project using Asset class 4001 which does not have check mark for Line item Settlement in the Asset Class and the Standard Asset Class 4001 is assigned to the investment profile 00001

Created Project in App : Project Control - Enterprise Projects, 

System Generated AUC Asset Code Automatically

But when i am creating the Settlement Rule for the Same AUC Asset Code System is Showing the Below Error.

Asset is investment measure, transaction type is not allowed. message no. AK005

Could you please advice on how to settle line items to an AUC using a investment measure profile.

If this is not feasible could you suggest an alternative method for settling the line items to AUC Asset.

Thank you.

entry.title: Questions about workers and business partners in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
1. When creating employees using Manage Workforce app creates 2 Business Partner user IDs when you create the Worker details and Work agreement details.
2. How to extend the Employee to Supplier customer data for mass creation without doing it manually in Maintain Business partner App.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Set Up the SEPA Direct Debit Pre Notification
entry.content:
Hello team,


We want to set up the SEPA Direct Debit notification.

Can you please guide us on how to set this up?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Copy custom field from sales order line item to PR line item
entry.content:
Hi,

We are working on SAP public cloud implementation. I have a custom field at sales order line item. In third party process, I would like this custom field to be copied to corresponding line of purchase requisition. In custom field App, there is no option to carry forward the custom field from sales order line to purchase requisition line. 

Did anyone experience such scenario?

Thanks,

Ketan

entry.title: S4HANA Cloud - form title doesn't show in page 3 and so on.
entry.content:
Hi,

The problem is if PDF files have more than 2 pages, the title doesn't show in page 3 and so on.

The master form template has 1 pageSet which contains 2 pages - mst1 and mst2.

I've checked the standard logic in txtPrintFormTitleText under frmHiddenGlobalFields in content form template.

	//Set title on first page (always available)
	xfa.resolveNode("#pageSet[0].mst1.FirstPage.frmHeader.txtTitle") = form_title
	
	//Set title on subsequent pages (if available)
	var pageCount = xfa.layout.pageCount();

	if (pageCount > "1")
	then
		xfa.resolveNode("#pageSet[0].mst2.SubsequentPage.frmHeader.txtTitle") = form_title
	endif

 But I couldn't find any problem in the code.

Has anyone seen this behaviour before?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: Unable to modify Qty in SKU field in MIGO Screen
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts!

I have created custom fields and used custom logic to calculate quantity in all three unit of measure. Now i want to update the QTY IN SKU field with this calculated value, but it's protected from modification and getting error as "The field cannot be modified" I tried modifying with "Change Item data in material documents" Badi.

The requirement now is once the field QTY IN SKU got modified it should update the values where used like stock list etc.

Kindly help how to achieve?

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to get WBS element field data into the XML file for PO print in SAP Public loud
entry.content:
Hi all,

I was trying to generate XML for the PO output but i was unable to find the "WBS Element", also the same field is not available in the data Source and the data source not extendable as well.

However the same field is available in GRN XML file. Can anyone suggest me how to add the WBS Element in the data source/XML file for PO print.

Below is the WBS Element in GRN XML file. "

"

Awaiting for your suggestions.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to add EKKO-LOEKZ on Manage PO on Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all, 

In the "Manage Purchase Orders" screen Public Cloud, we want to add the EKKO LOEKZ field to the filters to hide the orders where all items have been marked for deletion. However, we were unable to add it. How can we proceed on this matter?

 

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Standard email template for Sales Quotations
entry.content:
Hi,

We've seen that there is a standard email template for Sales Orders in the 'Maintain Email Templates' app: SD_SLS_DEFAULT_EMAIL_TEMPLATE. However, we need a standard template to use for Sales Quotations, is there a standard one available for quotations as well?

Kind regards.

[removed by moderator]


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Printing setup in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
How do we do printing and what kind of setup needs to be done?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to configure T042E_WANFF(Number of Days Until Bill of Exchange Pmnt Request Due Date)
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I would appreciate it so much if you would take the time to read and answer my question. 


■Customer requirement
I'm currently customizing the bill of exchange process for Japan in S/4HANA Public Cloud. The customer requirement is to change the due date for BOE payable (see the table below) based on vendors. The span from the posting date can be 1 to 3 months, but it depends on the vendors. (In the case of the table below, the span is 1 month.)
 

MMDDYYYYActionDue Date
12/16/2024Posting an invoice with the payment method O(for BOE)01/31/2025
01/31/2025Running an Automatic Payment Program to post a BOE for the invoice02/28/2025
02/28/2025Clearing the BOE-

 

 


■How I'm trying to deal with it 
For this requirement, I'm currently trying to configure T042E_WANFF in Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions(101044) so that I can configure the span for each payment method and then properly assign them to vendors.
■The problem that I have
Is there any way for activating this item? It seems perferct for this requirement, but somehow unavailable to change right now.(Please refer to the image attached.)


Another option would be to maintain terms of payment to have two dates : one is for the invoice, and the other is for the BoE.

Thank you,


Kaito
